messages.content:
Thanks for contacting Newcastle Live! We'll try to get back to you ASAP... Here's some handy links in the meantime. 

GIG & EVENT REGISTRATION: https://bit.ly/submitgigs

ADVERTISING & PROMO: https://bit.ly/newypromo

PRESS/STORY SUBMISSION: rockon@newcastlelive.com.au

MUSIC SUBMISSION: music@newcastlelive.com.au

EVERYTHING ELSE: newcastlelive.com.au or rockon@newcastlelive.com.au

share.share_text:
Local favourite Bodie is taking over the Royal Oak Hotel this November for a special month-long residency called Bodie & Friends with a truly all-star lineup of local musos like Zeal.H, Cormac Grant, Demi Mitchell, Aunty Alan and heaps more!

Find out all of the details by hitting our site.

#LiveMusic #Music #GigGuide #NewcastleNSW #Residency

share.share_text:
GIG GUIDE
Weve been cooking this one up for a minute!

Friday
$9800 Joker Draw followed by good friends @oceanheartsband & @chai_chester  comin to The Oak stage!

Saturday
@puffnoise coming all the way from Lismore for their first newy show in ageswith the boys from @_centralband_ & @jacqueslevysdesire kicking the night off from 7pm

Sunday
@huntervalleyramblers continues their Oak residency for the month of September, followed by @fahm.band & @splodge to finish it off

Aquarium Vinyls
Friday from 5pm @studio33_45 
Saturday from 3pm @pc___dysco 

You dont want to miss this one! 
Live. Local. Free 
#ROAK

share.share_text:
THE WEEKEND IN LIVE MUSIC (AND HEAPS GOOD FOOD)

FRIDAY 11/4
The Sneaks // Horse
Local crew the @the_sneaks_band takes over The Oak with a bit of Hip Hop, Reggae, Soul. Supported by good friends @livelove_horse  pulling out an impromptu Jam Sesh live on stage.

SATURDAY 12/4
Field Of Crows
Welcoming The Crows back to The Oak for a double set to keep you entertained all night. 

SUNDAY 13/4
Newy Food Month - Plate Date 
In collaboration with @shoutbrewing we bring an epic progressive Lunch
Fresh Food & Live Music
Still a few tickets available - LINK IN BIO
@newcastlefoodmonth

#roak #livemusic #freelivemusic 
@newcastlelive

@jackandtheaxes
